title: Add complete PEP 484 type annotations to 4-file e-commerce system

result.details:
=== Part 1: Specific Annotation Checks (16 points) ===
PASS: Product.__init__ params annotated
PASS: Customer.get_primary_address -> Optional
PASS: CartItem.subtotal -> float
PASS: Order.cancel -> bool
PASS: ProductRepo.find_by_id -> Optional[Product]
PASS: ProductRepo.find_all -> List[Product]
PASS: ProductRepo.delete -> bool

AssertionError: expected float, got None
FAIL: OrderRepo.total_revenue return type not float

AssertionError: expected float, got None
FAIL: CartService.get_total return type not float

AssertionError: no return annotation
FAIL: CartService.remove_item return type not Optional[CartItem]
Traceback (most recent call last):

AssertionError: no return annotation
FAIL: OrderService.create_order return type not Optional[Order]
Traceback (most recent call last):

AssertionError: expected bool, got None
FAIL: OrderService.cancel_order return type not bool
PASS: format_currency -> str
PASS: calculate_discount -> float
PASS: validate_email -> bool
PASS: generate_id -> str

=== Part 2: Structural Annotation Completeness (8 points) ===
PASS: models.py — all 16 functions have return annotations
FAIL: models.py — 2 parameters missing annotations
FAIL: repository.py — 12/19 functions have return annotations
FAIL: repository.py — 5 parameters missing annotations
FAIL: services.py — 1/14 functions have return annotations
FAIL: services.py — 10 parameters missing annotations
PASS: utils.py — all 6 functions have return annotations
PASS: utils.py — all parameters annotated

=== Part 3: Behavioral Tests (4 points) ===
PASS: All imports successful
PASS: Product behavior intact
PASS: Service workflow intact
PASS: Utils behavior intact

=== Summary ===
Annotation checks: see
